content:
# Session 38 (iter-038) — summary

## Metadata
- **No prover lane.** `attempts_raw.jsonl` line 1 = `{no_prover_lane: true}`. `meta.json` empty;
  `prover.jsonl` empty. Intentional mechanical no-dispatch (plan `## Decision made — terminal closeout`).
- Global sorry: unchanged. Core files 0-sorry; only `QuotScheme.lean` (4 χ, L126/165/201/228) +
  `RelativeSpec.lean` hold sorries (out-of-leg). No `.lean` edits this iter.
- sync_leanok iter=38: +0/−0, chapters_touched=[]. No targets attempted.

## What happened
2nd consecutive no-prover-lane closeout. Plan independently re-confirmed the sorry state (not assumed):
core leg files all 0-sorry; read `hilbertPolynomial` body and confirmed it is genuinely χ-blocked
(`Σ_i(-1)^i dim Hⁱ` + Snapper — a cohomology engine this H⁰ leg deliberately does not contain). Options
weighed and rejected: re-probe χ (cohomology-gated), unilaterally open the cohomology megaleg (overreach;
strategy-critic-validated scope boundary; user hasn't opened it via USER_HINTS), split the done 4k-line
file (busywork risking an axiom-clean file). Chosen: no-dispatch. Correct call.

## Leg state — DELIVERED axiom-clean, await merge
Entire closable scope in: GR functor-repr (`Grassmannian.represents` + `tautologicalQuotient_epi`) +
B1–B7 assoc + ∀L `GSemiring` + invertible-L `GCommSemiring` + module `sectionGradedModule_gmodule`.
No live prover frontier. The only remaining sorries (4 χ + RelativeSpec) are the deliberately-carved
cohomology / relative-spec legs, deferred since iter-001.

## Verification (mine)
- No new decls to `lean_verify` (file unchanged since iter-036; all deliverables previously confirmed
  axiom-clean `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`). No regression possible — zero edits.
- `QuotScheme.lean`: confirmed exactly 4 typed sorries at L126/165/201/228 (other `grep sorry` hits are
  docstring words, e.g. SGR L3880).
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 356 `lean_aux` nodes (all `proved:true`, `chapter:''`), inherited
  parent-construction decls — merge-time bookkeeping per ARCHON_MEMORY, not this-leg coverage debt.

## Blueprint doctor — out-of-cone, do NOT edit
All findings on dormant out-of-cone inherited chapters: `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange` (2 phantom covers
for non-existent `FlatBaseChange.lean`/`FlatBaseChangeGlobal.lean` + 14 broken `\ref`); `Picard_GlueDescent`
(4 broken `\cref`/`\uses`); `Picard_QuotScheme` (13 broken `\cref`). Extraction artifacts the parent
reconciles at merge. No prover dispatched near them ⇒ phantom covers misroute nothing. Editing inherited
chapters only creates merge conflicts. Deferred per established discipline.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. No chapter edit; sync +0/−0; no rename / wrong marker to correct.

## Key findings / patterns
- None new (no proving). All reusable patterns already in PROJECT_STATUS Knowledge Base + ARCHON_MEMORY +
  auto-memory MEMORY.md.

## Recommendations for next session
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: remain in terminal closeout / await merge unless USER_HINTS opens
cohomology scope or a genuine in-cone sorry surfaces.
